name: Buffalo Chicken Wings with Blue Cheese Dippin
recipeIngredient: 1/4 pound Blue cheese, Roquefort or blue cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a small saucepan over medium heat. Add hot pepper sauce and stir until combined.
2. Heat oil to 375°F (190°C) in a large frying pan or deep-fat fryer.
3. Fry chicken wings in batches, without overcrowding, for 10-15 minutes until golden brown. Remove with a slotted spoon and drain on paper towels.
4. Brush the cooked wings evenly with spicy butter.
5. To make the dipping sauce:
- In a small bowl, mash the blue cheese with a fork to create some texture.
- Whisk in mayonnaise until well combined.
- Add sour cream, lemon juice, and wine vinegar. Mix until smooth.
- Cover and refrigerate until ready to serve.
Sauce: Refrigerate until serving time.
